description: The result of a SOQL query, containing the matching records and pagination metadata.
name: QueryResult

totalSize.description: The total number of records matching the query. May be larger than the number of records in the current page if the result is paginated.

done.description: Whether all query results have been returned. If false, use nextRecordsUrl to retrieve the next page.

nextRecordsUrl.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results. Only present when done is false.

records.description: Array of SObject records matching the query. May be a partial result if the total exceeds the page size.

items.description: A Salesforce SObject record. Contains an attributes object describing the record type and URL, plus any number of field name/value pairs depending on the object type.

attributes.description: Metadata attributes for this SObject record, including its type and REST API URL.

type.description: The API name of the SObject type (e.g., Account, Contact).

url.description: The REST API URL for this specific record.

Id.description: The 18-character globally unique Salesforce record ID.
